mapper.select: select count(*) from platform_market_user where market_id = #{value}
mapper.insert: insert into platform_market_user (market_id, login_account, phone, password_hash, real_name, role_type, status, last_login_at) values (#{marketId}, #{loginAccount}, #{phone}, #{passwordHash}, #{realName}, #{roleType}, #{status}, #{lastLoginAt})
